Replace.Text: Trung Trac's Unique Army Commander. [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_AGELESS_TOOLTIP]Ageless[/TIP]. She has a [icon:NAR_REW_PROMOTION] Unique [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_PROMOTION_TOOLTIP]Promotion[/TIP] Tree that replaces Leadership and a Unique [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_COMMENDATION_TOOLTIP]Commendation[/TIP], Sisters Unite, that replaces Duty. Faster respawn than other [icon:UNIT_ARMY_COMMANDER] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_COMMANDER_TOOLTIP]Commanders[/TIP] if defeated. Appears after obtaining the first [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_LAND_UNITS_TOOLTIP]Land[/TIP] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_MILITARY_UNIT_TOOLTIP]Military Unit[/TIP] of the [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_AGE_TOOLTIP]Age[/TIP]. Begins with 2 [icon:NAR_REW_PROMOTION] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_PROMOTION_TOOLTIP]Promotions[/TIP] in Exploration Advanced Starts, and begins with 3 [icon:NAR_REW_PROMOTION] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_PROMOTION_TOOLTIP]Promotions[/TIP] in Modern Advanced Starts.
+5 Combat Strength against Fortified Districts for Land Units in the Command Radius. [n]{LOC_PROMOTION_ARMY_TRUNG_NHI_ATTACK_DAMAGE_DESCRIPTION}
+15 Combat Strength for this Commander when defending. [n]{LOC_PROMOTION_ARMY_TRUNG_NHI_ATTACK_DAMAGE_DESCRIPTION}
+5 Combat Strength for Land Units in Tropical Terrain in the Command Radius. [n]{LOC_PROMOTION_ARMY_TRUNG_NHI_ATTACK_DAMAGE_DESCRIPTION}
+3 Combat Strength for Land Units in the Command Radius when there are at least 2 enemy Units adjacent to Trung Nhi. [n]{LOC_PROMOTION_ARMY_TRUNG_NHI_ATTACK_DAMAGE_DESCRIPTION}
+5 Combat Strength for Land Units in the Command Radius when in friendly territory. [n]{LOC_PROMOTION_ARMY_TRUNG_NHI_ATTACK_DAMAGE_DESCRIPTION}
+5 Combat Strength with Coordinated Attack and Focus Fire. [n]{LOC_PROMOTION_ARMY_TRUNG_NHI_ATTACK_DAMAGE_FINAL_DESCRIPTION}
